milestones.title: Identify Defendant
milestones.description: Tutorial Question 1: The Judge asks Phoenix to identify the defendant. The player correctly selects 'Larry Butz' (Chinese: 矢张 政志) to proceed.

milestones.title: Identify Victim
milestones.description: Tutorial Question 2: The Judge asks for the victim's name. The player correctly selects 'Cindy Stone' (Chinese: 高日 美佳) from the profiles.

milestones.title: Identify Cause of Death
milestones.description: Tutorial Question 3: The Judge asks for the cause of death. The player correctly answers 'Hit with blunt object' (Chinese: 被钝器殴打) based on the context.

milestones.title: Expose Time Contradiction
milestones.description: Cross-Examination 1: Witness Sahwit claims he saw the defendant at 2:00 PM. The player presents the 'Autopsy Report' (Chinese: 高日 美佳的解剖纪录) to prove the murder actually occurred between 4:00 PM and 5:00 PM.

milestones.title: Expose TV Logic Hole
milestones.description: Cross-Examination 2: Sahwit claims he was watching TV and heard the time. The player presents the 'Blackout Record' (Chinese: 停电纪录) to prove the power was out at that time, making it impossible to watch TV.

milestones.title: Reveal Weapon's Secret
milestones.description: Cross-Examination 3: Sahwit mentions a 'clock' despite the weapon looking like a statue. The player presents 'The Thinker' (Chinese: 小雕像) to argue that Sahwit could only know it was a clock if he had held it.

milestones.title: Sound the Clock
milestones.description: Critical Decision: To prove the clock's time was incorrect, the player chooses to have the clock declare the time in court. It chimes 9:25 when the real time is 11:25, revealing a 2-hour discrepancy.

milestones.title: Solve the Time Gap
milestones.description: Final Evidence: The player presents the 'Passport' (Chinese: 护照) to explain the 2-hour clock discrepancy. It proves the victim had just returned from New York and hadn't reset the clock, explaining why Sahwit heard '2:00' during the 4:00 PM murder.

milestones.title: Not Guilty Verdict
milestones.description: Case Closed: After unmasking Frank Sahwit as the true killer, the Judge declares the defendant Larry Butz 'Not Guilty' (Chinese: 无罪).
